mapper.insert: INSERT INTO activity (category_id, title, content, location, start_time, end_time, deadline, max_count, current_count, creator_id, status, cover_image, create_time) VALUES (#{categoryId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{location}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{deadline}, #{maxCount}, #{currentCount}, #{creatorId}, #{status}, #{coverImage}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM activity ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE activity SET category_id = #{categoryId}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, location = #{location}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, deadline = #{deadline}, max_count = #{maxCount}, current_count = #{currentCount}, creator_id = #{creatorId}, status = #{status}, cover_image = #{coverImage} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM activity WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT (max_count <= current_count) FROM activity WHERE id = #{activityId}
mapper.update: UPDATE activity SET current_count = current_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
